snippet.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY | Secondo Trailer Ufficiale
snippet.description:
È un "nuovo giorno" per Peter Parker. Combattere il crimine a tempo pieno nei panni di Spider-Man in un mondo che non si ricorda di lui — e la pressione di vedere i suoi vecchi amici andare avanti senza di lui — innesca in Peter un cambiamento che potrebbe non riuscire a controllare. Ma questa trasformazione potrebbe essere l'unica cosa in grado di fermare una nuova e sconvolgente minaccia per la città e per le persone che ama: un potente nemico impossibile da vedere.
Il mondo può aver dimenticato Peter Parker, ma lui non ha dimenticato nessuno.

snippet.title: Shrek 5 | Teaser Trailer Ufficiale
snippet.description:
Estate 2027 al cinema #Shrek5
Seguici anche su:
Facebook: / universalpicturesit 
Instagram: / universalpicturesit 
X: http://www.x.com/universalpicsit
TikTok: / universalpicturesit
shrek-ilfilm.it

La prossima estate, DreamWorks Animation vi invita a prendere parte a un’emozionante e magica avventura in una delle più amate franchise animate al mondo: Shrek 5.

La leggenda comica Mike Myers, il candidato al Premio Oscar® Eddie Murphy e Cameron Diaz tornano nei loro celebri ruoli di Shrek, Ciuchino e Fiona. La vincitrice dell’Emmy Zendaya (Odissea, Dune) su aggiunge al cast nei panni della figlia di Shrek e Fiona, Felicia, insieme a Marcello Hernandez (Saturday Night Live, Happy Gilmore 2) e Skyler Gisondo (Superman, La rivincita delle sfigate) che prestano la voce ai fratelli di Felicia, Fergus e Farkle.

Shrek 5 è diretto dagli acclamati filmmaker e veterani della saga di Shrek Conrad Vernon e Walt Dohrn. Vernon ha preso parte alla squadra di regia di Shrek 2, candidato al Premio Oscar®, e ai film DreamWorks Animation Madagascar 3 - Ricercati in Europa e Mostri contro Alieni. Vernon ha anche prestato la voce all’amatissimo Omino pan di Zenzero, noto come “Zenzy”, in tutti i film dell’universo Shrek. Dohrn ha lavorato al secondo e al terzo film in qualità di sceneggiatore e artista, e al quarto come supervisore della sceneggiatura. Inoltre, Dohrn ha doppiato il personaggio di Tremotino in Shrek e vissero felici e contenti. Dorhn ha anche co-diretto Trolls e diretto Trolls World Tour e Trolls 3 – Tutti Insieme.

Torna a produrre il film la produttrice Gina Shay (franchise Trolls), che ha già prodotto Shrek e vissero felici e contenti, insieme al CEO di Illumination e candidato al Premio Oscar® Chris Meledandri (franchise Super Mario, franchise Cattivissimo Me / Minions). Il film è co-diretto da Brad Ableson (Minions 2 – Come Gru diventa cattivissimo; I Simpson).

Negli ultimi due decenni, il pubblico di tutto il mondo è stato affascinato dalle avventure divertenti e irriverenti dell’incompreso orco e del suo sgangherato gruppo di amici fiabeschi, ispirati al libro dell’acclamato autore William Steig. Sin dal 2001 con Shrek, vincitore del primissimo Premio Oscar® come Miglior Film d’Animazione, Shrek, CIuchino e Fiona (insieme ai loro amici, familiari e oppositori), sono diventati parte integrante della cultura popolare, ricordando al pubblico che la bellezza è negli occhi di chi guarda.

I quattro film di Shrek hanno incassato oltre 2.9 miliardi di dollari nel mondo, ispirando una tournée teatrale nel mondo, un musical a Broadway candidato a 9 Premi Tony e 12 Premi Drama Desk, oltre a un’immersiva esperienza a Londra e popolari eventi e attrazioni nei parchi a tema Universal Destinations & Experience.

‘Alastor’ and ‘Hazbin Hotel’ belong to Vivienne Medrano

This fan animation is non-canon and is not officially affiliated with Spindlehorse Productions.

LYRICS-----------

Dearly beloved,
For your entertainment, it's my pleasure to introduce to you Hell’s latest arrival;
The equal-opportunity killer, Alastor!

Hello, it’s nice to meet you!
Can you tell me where I am?
I don’t know how I got here
But I think I’m starting to understand.
I don’t belong among the angels
And baby, that’s just fine with me.
The things I did up there were high school
But now I’m going for my degree

Hey
Sorry, but you just got in my way
I promise, honey, I can feel your pain
And maybe I enjoy just a little bit
Does that make me insane?
Haven’t been the same since I expired
Doesn’t mean that I plan to retire
And now I have the power to bathe all of you in entertaining fire!

CHORUS -

Wait a minute, do I know you?
Weren’t you an old pal of mine?
Departed from us far too early
But now we’re meeting a second time.
We used to have such fun together
And maybe you have what I need
But first, I have one tiny question
Tell me, do you demons bleed?

CHORUS -

Hey
Sorry, but you just got in my way
I promise, honey, I can feel your pain
And maybe I enjoy just a little bit
Does that make me insane?
Haven’t been the same since I expired
Doesn’t mean that I plan to retire
And now I have the power to bathe all of you in entertaining fire!

Hey
Sorry, but you just got in my way
I promise, honey, I can feel your pain
And maybe I enjoy just a little bit
Does that make me insane?

END-----------

HELLO DDR's (Dedicated Description Readers)
What a crazy journey this has been... It's moments like this that put life into perspective! When we wrote this song 5 years ago, Nate had just gotten out of the Navy, I had just started shifting gears from Impressions to original music, and we were all trying to figure out how to make a living doing what we love: making music and videos.

Since then, my brother and I have written multiple charting records, been featured in Fortnite, NCIS, Poppy Playtime, Billie Bust Up, Garten of Ban Ban, and America's Got Talent (twice)! I became a pilot and bought my own airplane, Claire became a producer for Rob Riggle's podcast "Riggle's Picks", and Nate (is very private, but his life has also changed in so many ways). This song helped define the business that we run today and we couldn't be more grateful! So, to everyone who made this possible, THANK YOU!!!

LYRICS-----------

Dearly beloved,
For your entertainment, it's my pleasure to introduce to you Hell’s latest arrival;
The equal-opportunity killer, Alastor!

Hello, it’s nice to meet you!
Can you tell me where I am?
I don’t know how I got here
But I think I’m starting to understand.
I don’t belong among the angels
And baby, that’s just fine with me.
The things I did up there were high school
But now I’m going for my degree

Hey
Sorry, but you just got in my way
I promise, honey, I can feel your pain
And maybe I enjoy just a little bit
Does that make me insane?
Haven’t been the same since I expired
Doesn’t mean that I plan to retire
And now I have the power to bathe all of you in entertaining fire!

CHORUS -

Wait a minute, do I know you?
Weren’t you an old pal of mine?
Departed from us far too early
But now we’re meeting a second time.
We used to have such fun together
And maybe you have what I need
But first, I have one tiny question
Tell me, do you demons bleed?

CHORUS -

Hey
Sorry, but you just got in my way
I promise, honey, I can feel your pain
And maybe I enjoy just a little bit
Does that make me insane?
Haven’t been the same since I expired
Doesn’t mean that I plan to retire
And now I have the power to bathe all of you in entertaining fire!

Hey
Sorry, but you just got in my way
I promise, honey, I can feel your pain
And maybe I enjoy just a little bit
Does that make me insane?

END-----------

HELLO DDR's (Dedicated Description Readers)
What a crazy journey this has been... It's moments like this that put life into perspective! When we wrote this song 5 years ago, Nate had just gotten out of the Navy, I had just started shifting gears from Impressions to original music, and we were all trying to figure out how to make a living doing what we love: making music and videos.

Since then, my brother and I have written multiple charting records, been featured in Fortnite, NCIS, Poppy Playtime, Billie Bust Up, Garten of Ban Ban, and America's Got Talent (twice)! I became a pilot and bought my own airplane, Claire became a producer for Rob Riggle's podcast "Riggle's Picks", and Nate (is very private, but his life has also changed in so many ways). This song helped define the business that we run today and we couldn't be more grateful! So, to everyone who made this possible, THANK YOU!!!
